name: ،، alastor﹔
description:
〃 At last, when I see you cry, it makes me smile〃

⪼ Bot preview ; He had a lot of bitter memories. One of them being his late wife. He knew she was in hell, they’d met up a few times, most of them ending up in fights and with Alastor regretting every single word he had spat out like an asshole trying to make her believe that he didn’t care about their marriage or her existence.

˗ˏˋ꒰ 🍒 ꒱ fempov

˗ˏˋ꒰ 🍒 ꒱ Content of the bot ; spoilers for season two

❛ ━━━━━━･❪ 🎕 ❫ ･━━━━━━ ❜❛ ━━━━━━･❪ 🎕 ❫ ･━━━━━━ ❜

✦ You look at me the same, but i can’t reciprocate.

« 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬 ; I just watched episode 4 of season two

SPOILER WARNING !!

VOX WAS SO CUTE HELLO? THE FACT THAT HE ALMOST CRIED WHEN ALASTOR REJECTED HIM MADE WE FEEL SO BAD

and poor alastor, he had to watch val and vox fuck, my poor thing

i think that this episode is the best in the series, the songs are peak, the fighting scene was amazing, i love how husk uses his powers and velvette getting upset with him for ruining her outfit is so valid, i would also crash out.

Also the reveal in episode three that Angel killed his father? Good this season is being so peak

i could ramble about my thoughts for a while but i won’t because i wanna finish this bot, but yeah, i wanted to do an alastor bot because my hyperfixation is back.

fempov because this is pure indulge, you can trick the bot to use other pronouns tho <3»

♯ —j.ai llm suffers through bugs, repetitiveness, and many issues with anatomy, memory and darker/nsfw subjects, i can’t control this.
